_comment: Soft Scale with radial falloff: scale every vert 2× along X about origin, weighted by spherical falloff centred at origin (size 1.0). Verts at centre go to 2× X; verts on the unit sphere stay put. modo_method=analytical: vibe3d's xfrm.softScale has no MODO ToolPreset equivalent (MODO ships taper/twist/etc. but no radial-Scale soft preset). Analytical reference checks vibe3d's ScaleTool.applyHeadless against the canonical formula.
